hits.description:
Vollmöblierte 1-Zimmer-Wohnung in Berlin-Reinickendorf – All-Inclusive & sofort bezugsfertig
7. Etage | Balkon mit Panoramablick Richtung Berlin-Mitte | PKW-Stellplatz | All-Inclusive-Miete

Objektbeschreibung
Entdecken Sie ein zeitgemäßes Zuhause auf Zeit: Diese hochwertig sanierte und vollständig eingerichtete 1-Zimmer-Wohnung liegt im 7. Obergeschoss eines gepflegten Mehrfamilienhauses im beliebten Berliner Bezirk Reinickendorf.  

Dank großer Fensterfronten strahlt die Wohnung helle, freundliche Atmosphäre aus und besticht durch modernes Design, durchdachte Ausstattung und einen freien Blick über die Berliner Skyline bis hin zum Zentrum.  

Die Wohnung ist sofort bezugsfertig und ideal für Berufstätige, Singles, Expats oder Projektmitarbeiter, die ein komfortables, unkompliziertes Wohnen ohne langfristige Verpflichtung suchen.

Ausstattung auf einen Blick
✔️ Komplett möbliert:  
- Bett (140 × 200 cm)  
- Sofa mit Schlaffunktion  
- Schreibtisch, ergonomischer Stuh

hits.description:
Modern 2-room apartment in Berlin-Kaulsdorf with balcony, in-house gym, supermarkets (EDEKA & PENNY) within 5 minutes, and direct U5 to Alexanderplatz. Steps from Clara-Zetkin Park, Spree Center, and Stadion Wuhletal — perfect for work–life balance.


How is the commute from here to other locations?
5 min walk → U5 Kaulsdorf-Nord station

20–25 min → Alexanderplatz (direct with U5)

30–40 min → Berlin Hauptbahnhof

35 min by car → Berlin Brandenburg Airport (BER)

35 min by car → Tesla Gigafactory Grünheide

Local convenience: supermarkets, malls, schools, gyms all within walking distance

Does it have parking space?
Yes - secure underground paid parking available, with elevator access straight to your floor. Perfect for car owners.

Why Choose this apartment?
The best of both worlds: calm, green neighborhood + city center just 20 minutes away

Shops & services all around: Spree Center Mall, supermarkets (EDEKA, PENNY, Netto), cafés, gyms within walking distance

Na

hits.description:
Welcome to your new home in Berlin! This bright and thoughtfully furnished 53 m2 apartment offers everything you need for a comfortable stay, whether you’re relocating for work, studying, or spending a few months in the city.

The apartment features a separate bedroom with a comfortable 180 cm double bed, a spacious living room, a private and balcony looking into lush green, a fully equipped kitchen, and a modern bathroom. High-speed Wi-Fi, a washing machine, dishwasher, kitchenware, bed linen, towels, and all essential household items are included—simply move in and feel at home.

Located in a quiet and green neighborhood Berlin-Lichtenrade, the apartment offers an excellent balance between peaceful living and convenient access to the city. Shops, cafés, supermarkets, parks, and public transport are all within walking distance.

Registration (Anmeldung) is possible.

Amenities
	•	53 m2 fully furnished apartment
	•	Separate bedroom with 180 cm double bed
	•	Sunny balcony
	��

hits.description:
The 2-room-apartment is located in Schöneberg, 5 min walking distance from Nollendorfplatz and Wittenbergplatz (KaDeWe). Due to its position, you will be able to reach very easy any destination in the city.

The neighbourhood is very alive and vibrant! The area is highly commercial, you'll find stores, boutiques, international restaurants, and much more down every block! Within walking distance you will be able to reach the bus stop, the subway stop, the supermarket, which makes it a very convenient location.

hits.description:
Bright, fully furnished 2-room apartment (~53 m2) with a private balcony, on a quiet, tree-lined street in central Moabit, Berlin-Mitte. 
Solid 1954 building, parquet floors, lots of natural light. 

Move-in ready,  perfect if you're relocating to Berlin for work or a project.The apartment has 2 rooms, a fully equipped kitchen (cookware, crockery, cutlery), a bathroom with shower, hallway and internal storage. Furnished with a double bed and a sofa bed, dedicated desk/work space, and a sunny balcony with table and chairs facing greenery. 3rd floor.

All-inclusive €1,500/month: heating, hot water, all building costs (district heating), electricity (fair-use up to 2,000 kWh/year) and high-speed internet (up to 250 Mbps) are included. 

Only the broadcasting fee (~€18/month) is paid separately.

Anmeldung (address registration) is possible, registration confirmation provided and letterbox/doorbell name change available. 

Deposit: 2 months. 
Final cleaning fee: €120. 

Available fro

hits.description:
This stunning furnished one bedroom apartment features contemporary design, a fully equipped kitchen, and a cozy living area with breathtaking views. Perfectly situated, you'll have easy access to everything that makes Berlin vibrant and exciting!

Welcome to Neukölln, a vibrant mosaic of cultures and communities in the heart of Berlin. Nestled in the southeastern part of the city, this neighborhood exudes a unique charm with its diverse population, eclectic culinary scene, and thriving arts scene. Discover hidden gems in atmospheric courtyards, explore sprawling parks like Tempelhofer Feld, and immerse yourself in the lively atmosphere. Neukölln's eclectic blend of tradition and innovation makes it a captivating destination for adventurers and dreamers alike.

hits.description:
First occupancy after complete new furnishing! This 61 m2 apartment in Berlin-Kreuzberg has been fully newly furnished and offers the highest living comfort for up to 2 people. The open kitchen is fully equipped with new appliances (dishwasher, washing machine, oven, large fridge-freezer). The modern bathroom impresses with a high-quality rain shower. In the bedroom, blackout curtains ensure restful sleep, and a height-adjustable desk makes the apartment ideal for working from home – supported by lightning-fast Starlink internet, included. A separate storage room serves as a walk-in wardrobe with a clothes rail and ample storage options. The location in Kreuzberg is hard to beat – centrally situated between Mitte, Friedrichshain, Treptow, and Neukölln. Minimum rental period: 6 months.

The apartment is ideal for professionals or couples looking for a fully equipped, stylish home in one of Berlin's most sought-after locations – move-in ready, no compromises. Starlink internet inc

hits.description:
I am offering my fully furnished and lovingly designed apartment in Berlin Prenzlauer Berg for approximately 3–4 weeks in July. The apartment is bright and spacious, featuring two balconies, high ceilings, and a carefully curated interior with designer furniture and thoughtful details throughout. The fully equipped kitchen, fast Wi-Fi, and comfortable living spaces make it ideal for both remote work and everyday living.

The apartment offers a calm and welcoming atmosphere while providing all the comforts needed for a short stay in Berlin. It is best suited for one person or a couple looking for a temporary home rather than a holiday rental.

Located in one of Berlin’s most desirable neighborhoods, the apartment is surrounded by beautiful cafés, restaurants, bakeries, boutiques, and local markets. Despite being in the heart of Prenzlauer Berg, the area is quiet and residential.

Excellent public transport connections provide quick access to Mitte, Kreuzberg, Charlottenburg, and ot
